text: Beefapi launch post: AI relay/API service officially launched after testing. It offers $3 free credit in the first week, one-click access to Openclaw, Hermes, CC switch, and Cursor, domestic direct connection, Alipay payment, mainstream model access, stability and quality claims, QQ group support, and high-volume usage positioning.

Monthly progress update: Beefapi passed 800 registered users and daily revenue over 1000 RMB; Beef studio ecommerce image product is in final testing; enterprise AI development has first seed users in Italy with mid-May delivery target; X followers grew over 4000; private communities passed 2000 people; 10+ offline meetings and 3 commercial deals; joined Shengcaiyoudao through @gengdaJ and registered companies in Shanghai and Shenzhen.
Post invites people into a post-2000 AI founder discussion group.

After talking with AI media operators, he says X is better for influence, peers, relationships, and resources, while Xiaohongshu, Douyin, and WeChat Channels are better for consumer traffic, customers, and product sales.

He argues Justin Sun entering AI relay does not end the industry. He says bai pricing is expensive, likely targets wealthy B-side users, overlaps little with Beefapi customers, and increases overall market attention across Web3 circles.

SamSun says he had a long offline chat with the 04-born AI relay API founder @beefnoode, describes him as grounded and information-rich, and emphasizes doing concrete things instead of predicting the future.
